title: Purge Azure subscription/tenant IDs from dotfiles git history
description: GitHub repo jsgermanaai/dotfiles published Azure subscription IDs, tenant IDs, AKS cluster names, and resource group names through zsh/.zshrc. Move to ~/.zshrc.local (gitignored) and rewrite all history with git-filter-repo, then force-push.
close_reason: Moved Azure IDs to ~/.zshrc.local (gitignored), rewrote 13 commits with git-filter-repo blob callback, force-pushed clean history. Zero raw secrets in any reachable blob; bd remember saved (key: azure-aks-secrets-local-only).

value: NEVER commit Azure subscription IDs, tenant IDs, AKS cluster names, or Azure resource-group names to the dotfiles repo (or any public repo). The full set of go* aliases (gostage, goprod, gonewdev, godev, gooc, gogcprod, golt, gosandbox) and the aztoggle() function live in ~/.zshrc.local — gitignored, machine-local FOREVER. zsh/.zshrc only sources $HOME/.zshrc.local; it must contain no UUIDs, RG names, or cluster names. If you ever see Azure IDs/RG/cluster names landing in a tracked file: STOP, move them to ~/.zshrc.local, and run git-filter-repo + force-push to scrub history. (Backup: ~/dotfiles.backup-pre-scrub-20260501-111858.) Reason: GitHub repo jsgermanaai/dotfiles publicly exposed this infrastructure topology in commits 2037340, 092ce74, 305cd7f and was scrubbed 2026-05-01.
[Compass] /impeccable teach: scan mkdocs.yml / tailwind.config theme overrides FIRST. Spec drift caught by auditing in-progress edits — DESIGN.md asserted Roboto where mkdocs.yml had Inter.
